sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this fighting game

special_mechanics.name: Thrust-Blocking
special_mechanics.description: Aggressive blocking system similar to Street Fighter III's Parry system. Players can actively block incoming attacks.

special_mechanics.name: Deflect Moves
special_mechanics.description: Counterattack maneuver available to each character, allowing defensive repositioning during combat.

special_mechanics.name: Take Downs
special_mechanics.description: Special moves that knock opponents onto their back, enabling follow-up combo attacks while opponent is grounded.

special_mechanics.name: Death Combos
special_mechanics.description: Fatality-style combination attacks with gory visual effects on opponents. Can finish matches.

special_mechanics.name: Clothing/Hair Damage
special_mechanics.description: When certain attacks are performed on an opponent mid-swing, pieces of clothing or hair can be cut off.

special_mechanics.name: Charge Moves
special_mechanics.description: Special move execution method where a directional button is held for 2 seconds, then quickly pressed in opposite direction followed by attack button.

tier_notes: Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative): Fighting game with undocumented movement physics. Wikipedia and available sources provide gameplay mechanics and development details but no quantitative movement data. Game optimized for XBAND online play with lag compensation in animation timing and character turnaround time.
